description: Letter, fragmentary, from Eliyya b. Yehuda b. Yaḥyā, in Alexandria, to Nahray b. Nissim. Around 1052. The letter contains details about purchases and payments. Eliyya greets the addressee (probably Nahray) for his marriage and sends his greetings to Yehuda b. Seʿadya and his brother Mevorakh. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #705)
description_he: מכתב חלקי מאליה בן יהודה בן יחיא, אלכסנדריה, לנהראי בן ניסים, כ-1052, על רכישות ותשלומים ועל נישואי הנמען
